name: Zombie
description: A hostile mob that spawns in dark areas. It burns in sunlight and drops rotten flesh. Attacks in melee range.

name: Skeleton
description: A hostile mob that shoots arrows. It burns in sunlight. Drops bones, arrows, and sometimes a bow.

name: Creeper
description: A hostile mob that silently approaches players and explodes. Drops gunpowder. Can be killed by a charged Creeper to drop a music disc.

name: Blaze
description: A hostile mob found in Nether fortresses. It flies and shoots fireballs. Drops blaze rods, which are needed for eyes of ender and brewing.

name: Ender Dragon
description: The final boss of Minecraft. It lives in the End and is defeated by destroying the end crystals, then attacking the dragon when it perches.
